content: Hi, I'm looking for some fun activities to do with my fiancé. We're getting married next year and want to make the most of our time together before the wedding.
Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! There are a lot of fun activities you can do with your fiancé. What are your interests? Do you have any hobbies you both enjoy?
We both love mountain biking and trying out new board games. My fiancé is also into leatherworking and I've been trying to get into it too.
That's great! Mountain biking is a wonderful way to spend time together and get some exercise. There are some great trails in the Bay Area, have you tried any of them?
Yes, we've tried a few. We're actually planning a trip to Lake Tahoe next month to do some mountain biking and hiking. We're really excited about it.
Lake Tahoe is beautiful. You'll have a great time there. By the way, what do you do for work?
I'm a Data Scientist at BioGenesis Pharma. My fiancé is a researcher at Stanford. We're both really busy, but we make time for each other.
That's great! As a Data Scientist, you must be very analytical. I'm sure you'll have a lot of fun planning your wedding and making it a special day.
Definitely. We're planning on having a small, intimate wedding with around 50 guests. We want to make it a really personal and meaningful celebration.
That sounds like a great plan. A small wedding can be very beautiful and intimate. Have you thought about what kind of food you'll serve at the wedding?
We're thinking of having a dessert table with a lot of different options. I've been trying to perfect my sourdough recipe and I want to serve some of that at the wedding.
Sourdough is delicious. I'm sure your guests will love it. By the way, have you thought about what kind of music you'll have at the wedding?
We're thinking of having a live band. We've met some great musicians through our friends and we're excited to have them play at the wedding.
A live band will definitely keep the party going. I'm sure you'll have a lot of fun at the wedding. If you need any more help or suggestions, feel free to ask.
Thanks, I appreciate it. You've been really helpful.
You're welcome, Frankie. It was great chatting with you. I hope you have a fantastic wedding and a happy marriage!
Anytime, congratulations again on your upcoming wedding!
